reasoning: The control AU-9 (4) focuses on restricting access to audit information to a subset of privileged users. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by ensuring that audit logs are enabled and access to these logs is restricted using RBAC policies. Specifically, RBAC roles can be configured to allow only certain users or service accounts to view audit logs. Additionally, ensuring that audit logging is enabled is a fundamental step in protecting audit information.
title: Protection of Audit Information | Access by Subset of Privileged Users
